title: Dungeon Lords Steam Edition
notes: Appears to work fine on second run (silently crashed the first time), though extensive testing was hampered by my poor hardware.

1st start installed direct x and game never started, second start game loaded perfectly, played through arrindale no issues other than lag as the grass/tree and view distance sliders aren't doing anything. all other settings seem to work fine.
